title: CbEK`s Food`s and Drink`s
description:
This mod adds a simple thirst system with new drinks and new foods.
Drink or Die!
body:
![Cook, Wait & Collect – Survival Food System](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97c5449f7b13aac1d961a7ff4276d7fa0daac200_0.webp)

**CbEK’s Foods and Drinks** adds a small but immersive drinking and thirst system to Minecraft, along with a variety of new food items crafted through multi-step recipes. Players must manage their resources carefully to create new dishes and drinks, making survival gameplay more engaging and challenging.

**Features:**

   - Drinking and thirst system

   - New foods and drinks

   - Multi-step processing (cooking, waiting, cooling)

   - Designed for Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge)

This mod is perfect for players looking to expand their survival experience without altering the core vanilla style.

**Feedback & Bug Reports:** If you find any bugs or have ideas for improvement, feel free to contact me at lasangeesser@gmail.com
